# PHARMACARE RULES — MASTER REFERENCE FILE
# Auto-generated by scanning the actual codebase
# Last updated: April 2026

## HOW TO USE THIS FILE
Read this file before writing ANY new code. Cross-reference with PHARMACARE_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md for visual patterns.

---

# 1. DESIGN TOKENS

## CSS Variables (from /app/frontend/src/index.css)
```css
:root {
  --background: 0 0% 100%;           /* hsl(0, 0%, 100%) = #FFFFFF */
  --foreground: 0 0% 3.9%;           /* hsl(0, 0%, 3.9%) = near black */
  --card: 0 0% 100%;
  --card-foreground: 0 0% 3.9%;
  --popover: 0 0% 100%;
  --popover-foreground: 0 0% 3.9%;
  --primary: 0 0% 9%;                /* dark gray/black for Shadcn default */
  --primary-foreground: 0 0% 98%;
  --secondary: 0 0% 96.1%;
  --secondary-foreground: 0 0% 9%;
  --muted: 0 0% 96.1%;
  --muted-foreground: 0 0% 45.1%;
  --accent: 0 0% 96.1%;
  --accent-foreground: 0 0% 9%;
  --destructive: 0 84.2% 60.2%;      /* red for errors */
  --destructive-foreground: 0 0% 98%;
  --border: 0 0% 89.8%;
  --input: 0 0% 89.8%;
  --ring: 0 0% 3.9%;
  --radius: 0.5rem;                  /* 8px border radius */
}
```

## PharmaCare Custom Colors (from PHARMACARE_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md - use inline)
- Primary teal: `#0C7A6B` / `style={{ color: '#0C7A6B' }}`
- Teal hover: `#0A6859`
- Teal bg: `#E6F4F2`
- Teal border: `#9DCEC8`
- Primary button: `#13ecda` (used for CTAs)
- Dark text: `#0F0F0E`
- Body text: `#5A5A57`
- Muted text: `#989894`
- Red (amounts/errors): `#CC2F2F`
- Green (success/paid): `#166B3E`
- Amber (warning/parked): `#B87010`
- Blue (UPI): `#1D52CC`

## Font Family
- Primary: `DM Sans` (set inline via `fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif"`)
- Monospace: `font-mono` class for amounts, bill numbers, batch numbers

## Font Sizes (Tailwind classes used)
- `text-xs` (12px) - badges, uppercase labels, secondary info
- `text-sm` (14px) - body text, table cells, inputs
- `text-base` (16px) - default
- `text-lg` (18px) - section titles, large totals
- `text-xl` (20px) - page titles
- `text-2xl` (24px) - large amounts in footers

## Border Radius
- `--radius: 0.5rem` (8px)
- `rounded-lg` - cards, inputs, buttons
- `rounded-full` - badges, pills
- `rounded-md` - smaller elements

## Spacing (most commonly used)
- `px-4 py-3` - table cells
- `px-6 py-4` - page headers
- `px-6 py-3` - toolbars
- `gap-2` to `gap-4` - flex containers
- `space-y-4` - form fields
- `p-4` to `p-6` - cards, modals

---

# 2. COMPONENT USAGE RULES

## Button
**Import:** `import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'`

**Variants available:**
- `default` - dark bg, white text (Shadcn default)
- `destructive` - red bg for delete actions
- `outline` - bordered, transparent bg
- `secondary` - light gray bg
- `ghost` - no bg, hover shows bg
- `link` - underlined text

**Sizes available:**
- `default` - h-9 px-4 py-2
- `sm` - h-8 px-3 text-xs
- `lg` - h-10 px-8
- `icon` - h-9 w-9 (square)

**CURRENT CODEBASE PATTERN:**
Most pages use custom styled `<button>` elements with Tailwind, NOT the Shadcn Button component.
Primary action buttons use: `style={{ backgroundColor: '#13ecda' }}` with `text-gray-900`

**RULES:**
- Primary CTA: `className="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900" style={{ backgroundColor: '#13ecda' }}`
- Secondary/Cancel: `className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-200"`
- Outline: `className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"`
- Destructive: `className="bg-red-500 text-white"` or use `variant="destructive"` if using Shadcn Button

---

## Input / Search
**Import:** `import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'`

**CURRENT PATTERN (scan of codebase):**
Search fields are built with raw `<input>` + positioned icon:
```jsx
<div className="relative">
  <svg className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400">...</svg>
  <input 
    className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 w-48 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500"
    placeholder="Search..."
  />
</div>
```

**RULES:**
- All search fields must have Search icon as prefix (positioned absolutely)
- Focus ring: `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:border-transparent`
- Width: `w-48` for filter bar searches
- Border: `border border-gray-200`

---

## Popover + Calendar (Date Picker)
**Import:**
```jsx
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '../components/ui/popover';
import { Calendar } from '../components/ui/calendar';
import { format } from 'date-fns';
```

**CURRENT PATTERN (from PurchaseReturnCreate.js):**
```jsx
<Popover open={showDatePicker} onOpenChange={setShowDatePicker}>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
    <button
      className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg"
      style={{ backgroundColor: '#E6F4F2', border: '1px solid #9DCEC8' }}
    >
      <CalendarIcon className="w-4 h-4" style={{ color: '#0C7A6B' }} />
      <span className="text-sm font-medium" style={{ color: '#0C7A6B' }}>
        {format(date, 'dd MMM yyyy')}
      </span>
      <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" style={{ color: '#0C7A6B' }} />
    </button>
  </PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
    <Calendar
      mode="single"
      selected={date}
      onSelect={(d) => { setDate(d); setShowDatePicker(false); }}
      disabled={(d) => d > new Date()}
      initialFocus
    />
  </PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```

**RULES:**
- [ ] SHARED COMPONENT NEEDED: Create `/app/frontend/src/components/shared/DateRangePicker.jsx`
- Display format in trigger: `dd MMM yyyy` (e.g., "06 Apr 2026")
- Date range default: Financial year (01 Apr to 31 Mar)
- Filter applies immediately on select, no confirm button

---

## Sonner (Toast)
**Import:** `import { toast } from 'sonner'`

**CURRENT PATTERNS (scan of codebase):**
```jsx
// Success
toast.success('Payment recorded successfully');
toast.success('Supplier updated successfully');
toast.success('Product added successfully');

// Error
toast.error('Failed to load data');
toast.error('Failed to load suppliers');
toast.error(error.response?.data?.detail || 'Failed to save supplier');

// Info
toast.info('Print functionality coming soon');
toast.info('Logs coming soon');
```

**RULES:**
- Position: top-right (default)
- Success: Use for every create/update/delete action
- Error: Always show actual error message, fallback to generic: `error.response?.data?.detail || 'Failed to [action]'`
- Info: Use for "coming soon" features or non-critical notifications
- Message format: `[Entity] [action] successfully` (e.g., "Purchase saved successfully")
- Never show toast for silent/background operations
- Never use warning emojis in toast messages

---

## Badge / Status Pills
**Import:** `import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'` (rarely used)

**CURRENT PATTERN (scan of codebase):**
Most badges are inline `<span>` with Tailwind classes:
```jsx
<span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-700">
  Active
</span>
```

**COLOR MAPPINGS (consistent across codebase):**
| Status | Background | Text |
|--------|------------|------|
| Active / Success / Paid / Cash / In Stock | `bg-green-100` | `text-green-700` |
| Inactive / Cancelled | `bg-gray-100` or `bg-red-100` | `text-gray-700` or `text-red-700` |
| Credit / Pending / Warning / Parked | `bg-amber-100` | `text-amber-700` |
| Overdue / Due / Error / Out of Stock | `bg-red-100` | `text-red-700` |
| UPI / Info | `bg-blue-100` | `text-blue-700` |
| Adjusted / Return | `bg-purple-100` | `text-purple-700` |

**RULES:**
- Status must always be a badge, never plain text
- Base classes: `px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium`
- Alternative: `px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-semibold` (square corners)

---

## Table / List
**CURRENT PATTERN (from BillingOperations.js):**
```jsx
<table className="w-full">
  <thead className="bg-gray-50">
    <tr>
      <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
        Column
      </th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
    <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer">
      <td className="px-4 py-3">Content</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

**RULES:**
- Header: `bg-gray-50`, `text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide`
- Cells: `px-4 py-3`
- Row hover: `hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer` (if clickable)
- Amount columns: `text-right`, `font-mono font-semibold`, red for outstanding `style={{ color: '#CC2F2F' }}`
- Date columns: DD-MM-YY format (e.g., "06-04-26")
- Reference numbers: `font-mono` + teal color `style={{ color: '#0C7A6B' }}`
- Empty state: `<td colSpan="X" className="px-4 py-12 text-center text-gray-400">No [entity] found</td>`
- Loading state: `Loading...` text centered

---

## Modal / Dialog
**Import:**
```jsx
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
```

**CURRENT PATTERN (from InventoryImproved.js):**
```jsx
<Dialog open={showDialog} onOpenChange={setShowDialog}>
  <DialogContent className="max-w-2xl">
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Description</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    {/* Content */}
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

**ALTERNATIVE PATTERN (custom modal - from PurchaseReturnCreate.js):**
```jsx
<div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
  <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-2xl mx-4">
    <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between">
      <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-900">Title</h2>
      <button onClick={() => setShow(false)}>
        <X className="w-5 h-5" />
      </button>
    </div>
    <div className="p-6">{/* Content */}</div>
    <div className="px-6 py-4 border-t flex justify-end gap-3">
      {/* Buttons */}
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

**RULES:**
- Use for: confirmations, small forms (max 3-4 fields)
- Must have: title, close button (X), cancel button, confirm button
- Destructive confirmation: confirm button must be red
- Click outside / Escape = close
- Never nest modals

---

## Sheet / Side Panel
**CURRENT PATTERN (from Suppliers.js):**
Detail panel slides in from right as a half-width panel:
```jsx
{selectedItem && (
  <div className="w-1/2 overflow-auto p-4">
    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 h-full flex flex-col">
      {/* Header with close button */}
      {/* Tabs */}
      {/* Tab content */}
    </div>
  </div>
)}
```

**RULES:**
- Used for: detail views, large forms
- Slides from right (or appears as split panel)
- Always has close button (X) top right
- Width: `w-1/2` for desktop split view

---

## Tabs
**CURRENT PATTERN (from Suppliers.js):**
```jsx
<div className="flex gap-6">
  {['overview', 'history', 'outstanding'].map((tab) => (
    <button
      key={tab}
      onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
      className={`py-3 text-sm font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors ${
        activeTab === tab
          ? 'border-teal-600 text-teal-600'
          : 'border-transparent text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
      }`}
    >
      {tab}
    </button>
  ))}
</div>
```

**RULES:**
- Active tab: `border-teal-600 text-teal-600`
- Inactive tab: `border-transparent text-gray-500`
- Never hide tabs based on data — show empty state inside tab

---

# 3. FORM RULES

**CURRENT PATTERNS (scan of forms):**
- Required fields: NOT consistently marked with * (inconsistency)
- Validation: Mix of toast errors and inline (inconsistency)
- Labels: `text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-1`
- Inputs: `w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg`
- Focus: `focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500`

**RULES:**
- Required fields: Mark with `*` in label
- Validation: Show inline error below field in red (`text-red-500 text-sm`)
- On submit with errors: Scroll to first error field
- Currency inputs: `₹` prefix, 2 decimal places, `font-mono`
- Date inputs: Use shared DateRangePicker or `DD/MM/YYYY` text input
- Phone: 10 digits, numeric only
- GSTIN: 15 chars, alphanumeric, validate format
- Quantity: numeric only, no negatives

---

# 4. ICON RULES

**Library:** `lucide-react` ONLY — never use another icon library

**CURRENT ICONS IN USE:**
| Action | Icon | Import |
|--------|------|--------|
| Add / Create | `Plus` | `import { Plus } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Edit | `Edit` or `Edit2` | `import { Edit, Edit2 } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Delete | `Trash2` | `import { Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Search | `Search` | `import { Search } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Calendar | `Calendar` | `import { Calendar } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Back | `ArrowLeft` | `import { ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Close | `X` | `import { X } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Download | `Download` | `import { Download } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Filter | `Filter` | `import { Filter } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Print | `Printer` | `import { Printer } from 'lucide-react'` |
| More menu | `MoreVertical` | `import { MoreVertical } from 'lucide-react'` |
| Chevron | `ChevronDown`, `ChevronRight` | `import { ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'` |

**RULES:**
- Default size: `w-4 h-4` (16px) inline with text
- Standalone: `w-5 h-5` (20px)
- Color: inherits text color unless semantic

---

# 5. LAYOUT RULES

**Page Structure (Pattern A - List):**
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Page Header (title + stats | buttons)   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Filter Bar (search | date | pills)      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                         │
│          Scrollable Table               │
│                                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Footer (count left | total right)       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Page Structure (Pattern B - Create/Edit):**
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Header (← back | breadcrumb | title)    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Subbar (chips: date | entity | type)    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                         │
│          Form / Table                   │
│                                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Footer Row 1 (totals strip)             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Footer Row 2 (controls | buttons)       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**RULES:**
- Full height: `h-screen flex flex-col`
- Scrollable area: `flex-1 overflow-auto`
- Sticky header/footer: `shrink-0`
- Background: `bg-[#f6f8f8]` for page, `bg-white` for cards

---

# 6. LOADING AND EMPTY STATES

**Loading:**
```jsx
// Table loading
{loading ? (
  <tr>
    <td colSpan="X" className="px-4 py-12 text-center text-gray-400">
      Loading...
    </td>
  </tr>
) : (...)}

// Button loading
<button disabled={isLoading}>
  {isLoading ? 'Processing...' : 'Submit'}
</button>
```

**Empty State:**
```jsx
<tr>
  <td colSpan="X" className="px-4 py-12 text-center text-gray-400">
    No [entity] found
  </td>
</tr>
```

**RULES:**
- Never show blank white screen
- Tables: "Loading..." or "No X found" centered
- Buttons: Change text to "Processing...", "Saving...", etc.
- Add retry button for error states if applicable

---

# 7. CODING RULES — NON-NEGOTIABLE

1. **Never rewrite a working component** — only fix what is broken
2. **Never copy-paste components across pages** — create shared component
3. **Never add npm packages without confirmation** — list and ask first
4. **Never change files outside current task scope**
5. **After every task:** list every file changed and what was deliberately NOT touched
6. **Shared components location:** `/app/frontend/src/components/shared/` (TO BE CREATED)
7. **Pages location:** `/app/frontend/src/pages/`
8. **Never use inline styles** — use Tailwind (except PharmaCare custom colors)
9. **Never use arbitrary Tailwind values** (e.g., `w-[437px]`) unless necessary

---

# 8. FINANCIAL YEAR RULE

**Indian Financial Year:** 01 April to 31 March

**Dynamic Calculation:**
```javascript
const getFinancialYearRange = () => {
  const now = new Date();
  const currentMonth = now.getMonth(); // 0-11
  const currentYear = now.getFullYear();
  
  // FY starts in April (month 3)
  const fyStartYear = currentMonth >= 3 ? currentYear : currentYear - 1;
  
  const start = new Date(fyStartYear, 3, 1); // 01 April
  const end = new Date(fyStartYear + 1, 2, 31); // 31 March
  
  return { start, end };
};
```

**RULES:**
- All date range defaults must use this calculation
- Never hardcode year values
- Example: If today is June 2026, default range = 01 Apr 2026 to 31 Mar 2027

---

# INCONSISTENCIES FOUND (TO FIX LATER)

## HIGH PRIORITY
1. **No shared components directory** — `/app/frontend/src/components/shared/` does not exist
2. **Date picker re-implemented in every page** — Need shared DateRangePicker component
3. **Inconsistent button styling** — Mix of Shadcn Button and custom styled buttons
4. **Date format inconsistency** — Some use DD-MM-YY, others use DD MMM YYYY

## MEDIUM PRIORITY
5. **Required field marking** — Not all required fields have `*` in label
6. **Search icon positioning** — Some use SVG inline, others use Lucide Search
7. **Badge usage** — Mix of Shadcn Badge and custom spans
8. **Loading states** — Text only, no skeleton loaders

## LOW PRIORITY
9. **Dialog vs custom modal** — Inconsistent usage between Shadcn Dialog and custom modals
10. **Tab implementation** — Custom tabs, not using Shadcn Tabs component
11. **Form validation** — Mix of toast errors and no inline validation
